convert_headings_bold_italic_lists_table: Convert headings, bold/italic, lists, tables, links, code, and blockquotes into formatted Google Docs content. When off, content is inserted as plain text.
create_a_new_google_doc_with_a_title: Create a new Google Doc with a title and formatted content in a chosen folder.
describe_the_document_content_you_want_t: Describe the document content you want to create...
Describe the document content you want to write...
enter_parent_folder_id_leave_empty_for_r: Enter parent folder ID (leave empty for root folder)
enter_title_for_the_new_document: Enter title for the new document
integrate_google_docs_into_the_workflow_: Integrate Google Docs into the workflow. Can read, write, and create documents.
interpret_content_as_markdown_when_creat: Interpret content as Markdown when creating a document
read_a_google_doc_and_produce_a_concise: Read a Google Doc and produce a concise summary with key points and action items.
write_additional_content_into_an_existin: Write additional content into an existing Google Doc, such as a running log or report section.
